notes: Ground-truth exogenous events for EU27 energie pilot. Windows and expected levels fixed ex ante.

events.label: EU enlargement — 10 new member states
events.source: 10 countries joined EU May 2004; energy market integration accelerated

expected.I: increase — wider heat pump / solar integration network
expected.S: increase — diffusion of EU renewable norms to new members

events.falsification_prediction: C increase not observed in placebo 1997-2001 pre-enlargement

events.label: EU Emissions Trading System launch
events.source: EU ETS Phase I started January 2005; carbon price signal introduced

expected.demand: increase — climate finance flows increase post-ETS

events.label: Paris Agreement COP21
events.source: Paris Agreement signed December 2015; NDC commitments

expected.S: acceleration — EV electrification (road_elec) and solar adoption
expected.C: increase post-2015 — cumulative symbolic commitment regime

events.falsification_prediction: S/C acceleration not present in 2007-2012 negative control

events.label: COVID-19 energy demand collapse
events.source: EU industrial activity -15% in 2020 Q2; energy demand collapsed

expected.C: disruption 2020 then recovery if green recovery is symbolically cumulative

events.falsification_prediction: O collapse absent in negative control 2013-2018
